## Problem
A clear description of the problem or gap this feature addresses.

## Proposed solution
Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches you've considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples that would help clarify the request.
